name: Shadow Copy Creation Using OS Utilities Detected
description: Detects the creation of shadow copies using built-in Windows utilities like `PowerShell`, `wmic`, and `vssadmin`. Adversaries often use this technique to gain access to files that are locked or in use, which is a common **Credential Access** and **Collection** technique.

prompts.prompt: A critical alert has been triggered on the host **{host}**: a process, **{process}**, was executed with a command line (**{command}**) to create a shadow copy. This is a strong indicator of an adversary attempting to gain access to sensitive files, such as credential data, to perform **Credential Access** (**MITRE ATT&CK T1003**). Immediate investigation is required to determine the legitimacy of this action and to remove any malicious files. The event occurred under the user **{user}**.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The name of the host where the event occurred.

parameters.name: process
parameters.description: The name of the process that performed the action.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: The full command line that was executed to create the shadow copy.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account that performed the action.
